title: DN40 3DZ, VPI Immingham LLP: environmental permit issued – EPR/BJ8022IZ/V014
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: VPI Immingham LLP Installation name: Immingham CHP Power Plant Permit number: EPR/BJ8022IZ/V014  "
